text.title: langchain-production-patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are target_uptime, providers, latency_budget_ms, dep_policy all set in the profile?

branch.when: profile.valid == true AND len(providers) >= 2 AND target_uptime >= 0.995
profile.valid == true AND len(providers) >= 2 AND target_uptime < 0.995
profile.valid == true AND len(providers) < 2 AND latency_budget_ms > 500
profile.valid == true AND len(providers) < 2 AND latency_budget_ms <= 500
